## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `...`
2. Pass flags `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear description of what actually happened. Include any error output.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.12]
- uv version: [e.g., 0.4.x]
- Tool version: [e.g., 0.1.0 or commit hash]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (logs, screenshots, etc.).
